description: Sent to admins when a red-flag override is activated on an idea, triggering an automatic HOLD
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] {{idea_name}} — Red Flag Raised
body:
Red Flag Override Activated

A red-flag override has been applied to the following idea. The idea is automatically placed on HOLD and cannot progress from Validate to Build until all red flags are resolved.

Idea{{idea_name}}
Business Unit{{business_unit}}
Current Stage{{current_stage}}
Submitted By{{submitter_name}} ({{submitter_email}})

Red-Flag Conditions (any = auto HOLD):

  • No viable tenancy or data isolation approach
  • No design partner or pilot path
  • No accountable product owner
  • Unit economics structurally negative

View Idea on GitHub

You are receiving this because you are an admin on the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
